#[derive(Clone)]
struct Config {
    features: Vec<String>,
    limits: Vec<(String, u64)>,
    metadata: Vec<(String, String)>,
}

fn process_config(config: &Config) {
    // BAD: cloning large Config just for read-only access
    let cloned = config.clone();
    for feature in &cloned.features {
        println!("feature: {}", feature);
    }
    for (key, value) in &cloned.metadata {
        println!("{}: {}", key, value);
    }
}
